overview.description: Windows system tray app that downloads OrderHub jobs, routes print jobs to controllers via DPOF, and uploads film scans/file uploads to IBM S3.

modes.1: FTP polling — downloads artwork from FTP server on 60s interval
modes.2: Film Scans — watches local folder, copies to storage, uploads to IBM S3
modes.3: File Uploads — same pattern as Mode 2, different folders/prefix

foundation.notes: Electron shell, tray, IPC, config, logger, window manager all working

mode1_ftp.notes: FTP polling service, download to local directory, 60s interval

mode2_filmScans.notes: folder-watch-service.js watches local folder, s3-service.js uploads

mode3_fileUploads.notes: Same architecture as Mode 2, different source folder and S3 prefix

printControllers.notes: Full DPOF pipeline: PrintControllerStore, JobStore, DPOFGenerator, OrderFolderWriter, FolderMonitor, PrintControllerService, PrintService. IPC handlers and renderer UI present.

subComponents.PrintControllerStore: complete — controllers and channels persisted in print-controllers.json
subComponents.JobStore: complete — DPOF job state in jobs.json
subComponents.FolderMonitor: complete — fs.watch with 500ms debounce, o/e/q prefix detection
subComponents.PrintControllerService: complete — orchestrates submit + monitoring, one FolderMonitor per controller
subComponents.PrintService: complete — routes by process mapping (DPOF or file-copy pipeline)
subComponents.Renderer UI: complete — Print Controllers subtab in settings

s3Credentials.notes: s3-credentials.js — XOR-obfuscated, never exposed to renderer. Users configure: endpoint URL, bucket name, location ID only.

dpiValidation.notes: Full DPI validation system — no external dependencies (pure Node.js Buffer reads for JPEG/PNG/TIFF). Status levels: excellent/good/warning/poor. Per-threshold allowAutoSubmit flags. Modal for manual approval. DPI badge column in jobs table.
implementedFiles: src/renderer/index.html (updated — DPI settings fieldset + DPI modal)
src/renderer/renderer.js (updated — populateForm/getFormData, DPI badge column, Send to Print intercept, DPI modal function)

knownIssues.description: FolderMonitor regex requires numeric order numbers (/^[oeq](\d+)_(.+)$/). Alphanumeric order numbers (e.g. PXDEMO-K9MYDG) will not trigger status updates.
knownIssues.workaround: Ensure order numbers are numeric, or update regex if alphanumeric support is needed

knownIssues.description: fs.watch is unreliable on network share paths. FolderMonitor may miss rename events if the hot folder is on a UNC/network path.
knownIssues.workaround: Use local paths for hot folders; use mapped drive letters rather than UNC paths if network share is required

knownIssues.description: DPOF IMG SRC path uses ../IMAGES/ prefix. This means DPOF.001 is interpreted as being in a subdirectory. Verify with specific controller software.
knownIssues.workaround: Test with real controller; may need to adjust path if controller resolves differently

knownIssues.description: encryption-service.js exists in services but is unused. It can be removed.
FolderMonitor status updates (accepted/failed) are local-only (JobStore) and not pushed back to the OrderHub API.
knownIssues.workaround: Manual status update on OrderHub may be required when controller accepts/fails a job

knownIssues.description: Passwords (API key, FTP) stored in plain text in electron-store config.json.
knownIssues.workaround: Noted as Phase 1 deferred item. Future: implement Electron safeStorage API.

pendingWork.description: When FolderMonitor detects o→e (accepted) or o→q (failed), currently only JobStore is updated. Consider calling jobService to update the OrderHub API status.

pendingWork.title: Fix alphanumeric order number support in FolderMonitor
pendingWork.description: Change regex from /(\d+)/ to a broader pattern to support non-numeric order numbers. Also update OrderFolderWriter folder naming.

pendingWork.title: Remove encryption-service.js
pendingWork.description: File exists but is not imported or used anywhere. Safe to delete.

pendingWork.title: Verify IMG SRC path in DPOF with real Noritsu controller
pendingWork.description: The generated path is ../IMAGES/filename.jpg. Confirm this resolves correctly on a physical Noritsu QSS system.

pendingWork.title: Add monitoring auto-start on app launch
pendingWork.description: Currently monitoring must be started explicitly. Consider auto-starting monitoring for all active controllers on app startup.

pendingWork.title: Password encryption using safeStorage
pendingWork.description: API bearer token and FTP password are stored in plain text. Implement Electron safeStorage encryption.

services.polling-service: Mode 1: 60s interval API polling + FTP download
services.folder-watch-service: Modes 2+3: watches local folders for new files
services.s3-credentials: XOR-obfuscated hardcoded S3 credentials (never exposed to renderer)
services.folder-monitor: Watches hot folder for o→e/q renames via fs.watch
services.print-service: Routes OrderHub jobs: DPOF pipeline vs file-copy pipeline

files.config.json: Main settings (API key, FTP creds, download dir, process mappings, mode settings)
files.jobs.json: DPOF job cache with submission status

keyConventions.dpofFile: Always named DPOF.001, placed in order folder root
keyConventions.imageFolder: IMAGES/ subdirectory within each order folder

buildAndRun.run_development: npm start  (must run from project root; npm NOT in PATH from bash)

sessionHistory.summary: Created comprehensive print controller documentation (6 files in docs/print-controllers/) and PROJECT-STATE.json

Darkroom Pro controller type research and specification. Created docs/print-controllers/DARKROOM-PRO-FORMAT.md. Key findings: Darkroom Pro uses a flat key=value .TXT order file (NOT DPOF), dropped into a hot folder. Filename: Order{orderNumber}.TXT. File has two sections: (1) order-level header fields (OrderFirstName, OrderLastName, OrderEmail, Ext* custom extension fields, optional Index=1 for index print); (2) per-image line items using STICKY field inheritance — Qty, Size, Media, Template, Filepath. Only Filepath is mandatory per image; other fields carry forward until overridden. All images for a job go in ONE file. Images referenced by absolute/UNC path — NOT copied. Media= is the channel selector (paper type name). Template= is optional path to .crd border file. Status: success = .TXT moved to 'processed' subfolder; failure = renamed in-place to .err. PENDING IMPLEMENTATION: DarkroomProGenerator (with sticky field logic), DarkroomProFileWriter, DarkroomProMonitor (watches for .TXT disappearance and .err appearance).

Darkroom Pro implementation complete. Created: darkroom-pro-generator.js (sticky field logic, resolveTemplatePath(), _splitName(), filename()), darkroom-pro-file-writer.js (writes Order{n}.TXT to hot folder), darkroom-pro-monitor.js (fs.watch for .TXT disappearance = accepted, .err appearance = failed, trackSubmission() for race prevention). Updated: print-service.js (_sendViaDarkroomPro() branch), print-controller-service.js (renamed folderMonitors→monitors, DarkroomProMonitor branching, getMonitor()), ipc-handlers.js (channel log label fix), index.html (description updated). PROJECT-STATE.json fixed (stray quote removed). Remaining: UI for templateMappings/extFieldMappings; confirm 'processed' subfolder name.

DPI Validation system implemented (all 9 parts). NEW: dpi-validator.js — pure Node.js JPEG/PNG/TIFF dimension reading (no npm deps), status levels excellent/good/warning/poor, per-threshold allowAutoSubmit flags, batch validate. config-service.js — 6 new DPI schema fields (dpiValidationEnabled, dpiExcellentThreshold, dpiWarningThreshold, dpiWarningAllowAutoSubmit, dpiPoorThreshold, dpiPoorAllowAutoSubmit). ipc-handlers.js — jobs:validateDpi and jobs:approveDpi IPC handlers. preload.js — validateJobDpi and approveDpiJob exposed. index.html — DPI Validation settings fieldset (Downloads sub-tab) + DPI modal overlay. renderer.js — populateForm/getFormData for DPI fields, DPI badge column in jobs table, Send to Print intercept (checks DPI first, shows modal if manual approval needed), showDpiModal() function, toggleDpiValidationFields(). test script: scripts/test-dpi-validation.js (11 tests, runs without Electron). docs: VALIDATION.md.

darkroomPro.sourceReference: https://workdrive.zohoexternal.com/external/6OolXaIKMgx-JtDtd (Order File Processing Spec Generic.pdf — Zoho auth required, could not auto-fetch). Spec confirmed by sample file provided 2026-02-21.
keyDifferencesFromDPOF: Flat key=value .TXT file per job — filename is Order{orderNumber}.TXT
ALL images for a job go in ONE file (confirmed)
No folder structure — just a single .TXT file; images stay at their absolute/UNC path (NOT copied)
File has two sections: order header (OrderFirstName, OrderLastName, OrderEmail, Ext* fields, Index) then image line items
Image fields are STICKY — Qty/Size/Media/Template carry forward until explicitly overridden; Filepath always triggers a new image
Channel selector is Media= (paper type name string), NOT a channel number
Template= is optional path to .crd border file — omit for plain prints
Index=1 in header triggers a thumbnail index print with all order header data
Status: success = .TXT moved to 'processed' subfolder by Darkroom Pro
Status: failure = .TXT renamed in-place to .err (same folder, extension change only)

fileFormat.structure: order header fields, then sequential image line items with sticky field inheritance

orderHeaderFields.OrderFirstName: Customer first name (split from job.customer_name on first space)
orderHeaderFields.OrderLastName: Customer last name (remainder after first space)
orderHeaderFields.Ext*: Arbitrary extension fields e.g. ExtCabin, ExtFolio — configurable per controller in OHD
orderHeaderFields.Index: 1 = generate index/thumbnail print; 0 or absent = no index print

imageLineItemFields.Qty: Number of copies — sticky, only write when changing
imageLineItemFields.Size: Print size e.g. 8x10 — sticky, only write when changing
imageLineItemFields.Media: Paper/media type name as configured in Darkroom Pro — sticky, only write when changing. This is the channel selector.
imageLineItemFields.Template: Optional: absolute Windows path to .crd border file — sticky, only write when changing
imageLineItemFields.Tmp.Name: Optional: customer name for printing on border/template
imageLineItemFields.Filepath: Absolute or UNC path to source image — triggers new image using current sticky field values

mappingFromOH.OrderLastName: Remainder of job.customer_name after first space
mappingFromOH.Ext*: Configurable — mapped from job options/custom fields per controller setup
mappingFromOH.Qty: manifest.images[].quantity (write only when changed from previous image)
mappingFromOH.Size: manifest.images[].size (write only when changed from previous image)
mappingFromOH.Media: Channel config mediaName — looked up by size match (write only when changed)
mappingFromOH.Template: Channel config templatePath — omit if empty (write only when changed)

statusMechanism.submitted: OHD writes Order{n}.TXT to watch folder
statusMechanism.accepted: .TXT file disappears from watch folder root (Darkroom Pro moves it to 'processed' subfolder)
statusMechanism.failed: .TXT extension changes to .err in same watch folder (Darkroom Pro renames in-place)

templateMapping.note: Template= is driven by an OH job OPTION (e.g. option name 'Border', value 'Sports Golf'), NOT a channel property. Media= and Template= coexist — not mutually exclusive. Media= routes to printer/paper; Template= adds border overlay.
templateMapping.Tmp.Name: Always written alongside Template= — value is job.customer_name

extFieldMapping.note: Ext* field names are arbitrary per Darkroom Pro installation (e.g. ExtCabin, ExtFolio, ExtStudentId). OHD must allow admin to configure mapping: OH option/field name → Ext* key name

confirmedAnswers.Q5_UNCpaths: CONFIRMED — UNC paths (\\server\share\...) work fine for Filepath=
confirmedAnswers.Q8_TemplateAndMedia: CONFIRMED — Template= and Media= coexist in same line item. Not mutually exclusive.

pendingWork: Confirm exact 'processed' subfolder name from Darkroom Pro installation (currently assumed 'processed', configurable via controller.processedFolderName)
rendererUIChanges: Type dropdown: added 'Darkroom Pro' option alongside Noritsu / Epson
DPOF-only fields (Vendor Name, Vendor Attribute, Auto Correct) hidden when type = darkroompro
Darkroom Pro-only fields shown when type = darkroompro: Processed Folder Name, Index Print checkbox
Channel header and channel rows are type-aware: DPOF shows Ch#/Size/Finish/Style; Darkroom Pro shows Size/Finish/Media Name
Template Mappings section (Darkroom Pro only): Option Name + Option Value + Template Path (.crd)
Ext* Field Mappings section (Darkroom Pro only): OH Option/Field Name + Ext* Key Name
All sections toggle correctly when Type is changed on an existing or new card
